seo.title: Privacy | Exit Media Group
seo.description: How we collect, use, and protect your data.

title: Privacy
intro: We handle your data with transparency, proportionality, and care.

sections.heading: Data we collect
sections.body: We may collect information submitted through forms (name, email, message) and basic technical browsing data.

sections.heading: How we use it
sections.body: We use this data to respond to inquiries, improve service quality, and maintain commercial communications.

sections.heading: Your rights
sections.body: You can request access, correction, or deletion by contacting info@exitmediagroup.com.
